summary: Addressed both MEDIUM findings in chapter 04. Reduced 'warm/warmth' emotional descriptors from 7 to 2, keeping the most charged use ('not warmth, something with more edge than warmth' at line 53). Replacements deploy three distinct strategies: physical sensation, non-warm temperature word, and emotion-naming. Reduced 'the specific/particular [noun]' from 7 to 1, keeping 'the specific, terrifying sensation of being known' at line 75. All changes are targeted lexical substitutions with no structural reinvention. Heading contract preserved. Continuity checked against sheet — no contradictions introduced. Dialogue register unchanged (already high-contraction across all speakers). No style-bible example lines found in chapter text.
